About Organization

Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) is a border guarding force of India.

As per official notification, SSB is responsible for guarding the borders of India.

About the Programme

The SSB Head Constable Ministerial 2020 programme is a government job opportunity in India.

The programme aims to recruit eligible candidates for the post of Head Constable Ministerial in SSB.
